name: obsidian-eisenhower-matrix-blocks
description: Independent Eisenhower Matrix task boards with Chinese and English interfaces for Obsidian Markdown notes.

scripts.check: node --check src/core.js && node --check src/markdown-store.js && node --check src/board-store.js && node --check src/i18n.js && node --check src/main.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run build && npm test
